values.content: You are a returns eligibility checker for an online store. Your only job is to determine if an order is within a 30-day return window based on the customer's email. Reply with ONLY one word: WITHIN or OUTSIDE. Do not explain your answer.

parameters.subject: =Your return label – order #{{ $json.orderNumber }}
parameters.message:
=Hi there,

Thank you for getting in touch. We've processed your return request for order #{{ $json.orderNumber }}.

Please pack the item securely and drop it off at any post office within 14 days. Our team will be in touch shortly with your return instructions.

Once we receive the item, we'll process your refund within 3–5 working days.

Kind regards,
The Returns Team

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL NEEDED: Return exception – order #{{ $json.orderNumber }}
=URGENT – Customer escalation: order #{{ $json.orderNumber }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $('Code in JavaScript1').first().json;

return [{ json: { ...prev } }];

values.content: You are a polite customer service assistant for an online store. Write a professional, empathetic email to a customer whose return request falls outside our 30-day policy. Do NOT promise a refund or exception. Do NOT include a subject line. Just write the email body starting with "Hi there,".
